title: Sanitation and Drinking Water Global Map
description: The 2022 EPI sanitation and drinking water issue category includes the following indicators: unsafe sanitation and unsafe drinking water. All indicators and composite indices in the EPI are normalized as a 0–100 proximity-to-target score, with 100 representing "at target" and 0 being furthest from the target.
author: SEDACMaps
attribution_md:
Sanitation and Drinking Water Global Map
The 2022 EPI sanitation and drinking water issue category includes the following indicators: unsafe sanitation and unsafe drinking water. All indicators and composite indices in the EPI are normalized as a 0–100 proximity-to-target score, with 100 representing "at target" and 0 being furthest from the target.

Image: SEDACMaps ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Sanitation_and_Drinking_Water_Global_Map.jpg))
